g.text: IMPACT · WHAT A LEGIBLE FIRST HOUR WOULD CHANGE
Measuring a more legible first hour.

text.tspan: These are the signals we would instrument — not results we are claiming. Every one tracks a single idea: a
first hour a beginner can read, recover inside, and finish.
Minutes from first open to a
Share of new users who finish one
proof the safety net gets used,
New users who come back within

g.text: REDUCE THE GRADIENT, NOT THE POWER
Same destination. A first hour you can actually climb.
real progress in the first hour

text.tspan: Blender does not need to be less powerful. It needs to become
